subject: docs(claude-md): align with glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Full alignment pass against the upstream fleet CLAUDE.md
(https://devmade-ai.github.io/glow-props/CLAUDE.md). Adds missing
sections, rules, and the expanded trigger taxonomy so graphiki
inherits fleet-wide conventions. Project-specific content (Alpha
Phase notes, Frontend styles rules, TutorialModal sync, PROJECT
section, CROSS-REFERENCES) preserved as graphiki extensions.

Changes:
- Promote H1 to match glow-props ("READ AND FOLLOW …").
- Add Process section (3-step: read → gather → proceed).
- Add Principles section (7 numbered principles).
- Communication: add "Work, not process" rule (no opining on
  branching/PRs/git history editing).
- Code Organization: threshold terminology "class" → "component",
  drop redundant "Split large classes" bullet.
- Add Timer and Subscription Cleanup subsection (HMR-safe guards,
  AbortController, dispose patterns).
- AI Notes: add "All code is yours" and "Discontinued repos"
  (plant-fur, coin-zapp skipped).
- Prohibitions: add 3 missing rules (no mentioning
  branches/PRs/squashing unless raised, no "out of scope" framing,
  no opinions on git history editing).
- Documentation: expand compressed table into per-doc H3 sections
  matching glow-props format, add README.md entry, keep
  graphiki-only CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md entry.
- Triggers: replace 10-row flat list with glow-props' 48-trigger
  taxonomy (8 groups + meta sweeps + reflective passes + fleet
  alignment triggers `align`/`pattern-audit`).
- Rename ## HARD RULES → ## Code Standards umbrella.
- Add REMINDER footers to Process, Principles, Code Standards,
  Documentation, AI Notes, Triggers, Prohibitions.

No behavior changes — pure documentation alignment.

Tags: documentation, claude-md, fleet-alignment, glow-props
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
